metadata.guardrail: AI copy is generated from validated metrics and does not modify numeric source data.

hero.headline: Closed-won revenue is ahead of goal by $1,250,000
hero.body: The latest CRM refresh shows $3,250,000 in closed-won sales against a $2,000,000 goal — 162.5% of target and $1,250,000 above plan. Open pipeline stands at $4,840,000 across 9 active opportunities.

cards.title: Goal exceeded
cards.body: Closed-won sales of $3,250,000 surpass the $2,000,000 goal by $1,250,000, putting the team at 162.5% of target.

cards.title: Strong open pipeline
cards.body: 12 total opportunities worth $8,780,000 are tracked, with $6,152,500 in weighted pipeline and $4,840,000 still open.

cards.title: West leads all regions
cards.body: The West region tops the board with $4,410,000 across 4 opportunities, making it the largest region in this refresh.

cards.title: Follow-up queue
cards.body: 2 open opportunities have not been updated in 21 or more days and remain flagged for review.
